summary: Fix SKILL_AFFINITY blocker #5: replace hardcoded routing table with registry-sourced dynamic builder. Enables all 25 registry skills to appear in advise() routing recommendations automatically, eliminating need to manually update hardcoded table for new skills.

removed: Global SKILL_AFFINITY constant (lines 71-83) replaced with instance-based loading
added: SKILL_AFFINITY_FALLBACK constant with original hardcoded map (lines 72-85)
Function _buildSkillAffinity(registryPath) at lines 90-139 that loads registry.json and builds affinity map from skill categories and triggers
Constructor loading of registry at construction time (lines 148-152)
Instance variable this.skillAffinity storing loaded affinity map
3 new test cases in orchestration-advisor.test.js: existing behavior preserved, registry map built correctly, fallback on failure
modified: _computeRouting() now uses this.skillAffinity instead of global SKILL_AFFINITY (line 411)
Module exports now export SKILL_AFFINITY_FALLBACK instead of global (line 577)
2 existing tests updated to use deploy instead of git (git now has 3 registry skills)

notes: TDD cycle: RED (tests written first) → GREEN (implementation) → REFACTOR (merged with fallback). All orchestration-advisor tests pass (17/17). Registry loading verified: 217 total affinity categories (11 hardcoded + 206 from registry). Backward compatible: hardcoded categories preserved, existing tests pass with minor updates. Fail-open design: no crash on registry load failure.
